subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-06-19 in New York
subcodes.first_line: Tomorrow I wish to go to Montclair. Today is the last day in which we gather together with you... In former cycles no distinct Covenant has been made…
subcodes.first_line_orig: فردا من میخواهم بمونت کلر بروم امروز روز آخر است باز مراجعت خواهم کرد لهذا
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @House of Justice, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations
